Author: The Enceladeum
Name: HOutfits
Punchline: Apply full sets to your character in Glamourer with a single click.
Description: Lists the game's complete named sets and applies a whole set or any single piece to your character through Glamourer, instead of picking each item from a dropdown.
Changelog: 0.1.3: new "Include accessories" toggle at the top of the window. When off, applying a whole set skips earrings, necklace, bracelets, and rings (handy when you keep your own accessories or hide them); you can still click a single accessory icon to apply just that piece. The choice persists across sessions.
